ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Qing (еӯ«иј•)was born in Heishan. Bandit leader, persuaded to surrender by Zhang Liao. Sun Qing was a bandit affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
